DENC2092232.description: Absolutely stunning brick front home with nearly 4,000 square feet of elegant living located in the ever popular Appoquinimink School district. Enter this home through the impressive newer double doors and into the dramatic two story hardwood foyer. Updated gourmet kitchen includes gas range, newer granite countertops, dry bar and backsplash, bright morning room w/skylights overlooking incredible serene pond, first floor study, incredible two story family room with gas fireplace, hardwood floors and premium window package and first floor laundry. A turned staircase will take you to the second floor which includes an oversized owners suite with TWO separate sitting areas, luxury bath with whirlpool tub and oversized walk-in closet. A partially finished lower level complete with large gathering area and media room (speakers and receiver remain for the new owner), newer furnace, roof, hot water heater and some newer windows. This is a true gem and you won't want to miss it!!

DENC2093778.description: Superb. newer carriage style home located in the ever popular active adult community of Whispering Woods!! Oversized great room with recessed lighting, gas fireplace and luxury vinyl plank flooring, gourmet kitchen w/granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, island and separate eating area, owners suite with coffered ceiling, ceiling fans, sitting area and oversized walk-in closet and more!! Outside enjoy the private screened porch with ceiling fan and paver patio!! Two car garage!!! Community amenities are countless with the pool, clubhouse, pickleball, themed events and more!! Don't miss this gem!!

DENC2091894.description: Superb, spacious end unit townhome on premium lot located in the ever popular Appoquinimink School District!! Special features include upgraded gourmet kitchen with hardwood floors, stainless appliances (new refrigerator and dishwasher), island, granite countertops and recessed lighting, breakfast room with walkout bay window, oversized great room with loads of natural light, lower level bonus room -- perfect for home office or playroom, oversized 2 car garage, all new maintenance free vinyl flooring and brand new carpet, rear deck, neutral decor and so much more!! Don't miss this gem!!

DENC2089974.description: CREATE YOUR DREAM on this WATERFRONT lot located in the ever popular Appoquinimink School District! Public water/sewer on site. Please reach out for more details!!

DENC2093658.description: Stunning 4 bedroom home on private 3/4 acre lot in the ever popular Brick Mill Farms community!! Elegant two story foyer with butterfly staircase, living room w/vaulted ceiling, LVP flooring, spacious kitchen includes new ceramic tile backsplash, island w/pendant lighting, stainless steel appliances and recessed lighting, family room w/gas fireplace, large owners suite w/2 closets, full basement, new carpet, two car turned garage, shed and more! The best part is the 20x16 screened porch with trex decking and ceiling fan! Don't miss this gem!!

DENC2091926.description: Superb townhome located in the ever popular Spring Oaks community and Appoquinimink School District! Enter this home through the elegant foyer with wainscoating and wood floors, spacious kitchen with granite countertops, recessed lighting and stainless appliances, upgraded bathroom vanities w/granite tops and ceramic tile showers, family room w/wood floors, oversized owners suite w/sitting area, second floor laundry, garage and more! Don't miss this gem!!

DENC2093782.description: Superb. newer carriage style home located in the ever popular active adult community of Whispering Woods!! Oversized great room with recessed lighting, gas fireplace and luxury vinyl plank flooring, gourmet kitchen w/granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, island and separate eating area, owners suite with coffered ceiling, ceiling fans, sitting area and oversized walk-in closet and more!! Outside enjoy the private screened porch with ceiling fan and paver patio!! Two car garage!!! Community amenities are countless with the pool, clubhouse, pickleball, themed events and more!! Don't miss this gem!!

DENC2091364.description: Superb, brick front rarely available end unit in the ever popular Mendenhall Village!! Eat-in kitchen with 12x12 ceramic tile and stainless steel appliances, formal dining room and sunken living room w/hardwood floors and fireplace, finished lower level, oversized owners suite, fenced yard and more! Don't miss this gem!!

DENC2093500.description: Awesome 2/3 bedroom cape cod with large fenced yard! Spacious living room w/ceiling fan, kitchen w/microwave, laminate flooring, oversized bonus room on second floor (perfect for possible bedroom, play room, etc), full basement and more!!
